他一接触美女，就能知道她们身上的记忆、经历、心声、阴谋和隐私，并拿捏住她们；他帅气妖孽，苟在敌营里就像逛女儿国一样艳遇不断；他坑蒙拐骗鬼话连篇，把敌营里的女特务哄的神魂颠倒。他混在敌营，能把各种各样的女特务变成自己的内线，从她们身上不声不响的获取情报。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/611b0a9409d11c2f1e882dfadbb859bf","author":"龙门剑歌","author_id":"","book_id":"7370883727188036633","book_name":"谍战：接触女特务就变强","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9562人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7370892598849847833","read_count":"9562","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"356644"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"165","tags":"抗战谍战,系统,穿越,都市","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d0dfa2186db448d0fbba54e5cc9a2a66~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435000&x-signature=iET9BUvgIonGKOZS3mnZn4gTdHI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3333348736384920","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"152"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315295909651066497ED3704008"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15505,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9927},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"us
